sections.firstHeading: Turn missed calls into confirmed revenue
sections.gist: YOUR 24/7 AI WORKFORCE Turn missed calls into confirmed revenue We engineer AI agents that handle your calls, chats, and workflows with surgical precision. No delays. No excuses. Just measurable results.
TRUSTED BY INDUSTRY LEADERS 64% booking increase 3 min claim resolution 72 hrs to market $72K dev savings 47% cost reduction 3x more leads
SERVICES Three precision tools for 10x growth Deploy AI agents that work around the clock, handle unlimited conversations, and scale with your business.
CASE STUDIES Real results from real businesses Sanitol Lead Generation 3x qualified leads 40% more contracts 10 sec response time Tripled qualified leads with AI-powered outreach
OUR PROCESS From zero to 10x A proven methodology refined across dozens of successful implementations. 01 Strategy DISCOVERY We analyze your business...
READY TO TRANSFORM? Build your automation blueprint Book a discovery call and we'll map out exactly how AI agents can 10x your business operations.

animLib: none detected — no gsap/anime/framer/lottie/lenis/three or other anim library found in window globals or network scripts; site uses CSS transitions/Tailwind only

notes.stack: React SPA bundled as single index-D0KGWUrM.js, served via Replit/Cloudflare. Tailwind CSS utility classes visible in className strings.
notes.theme: Dark/light hybrid — hero and services sections use near-black hsl(0,0%,4%), social proof and case studies sections use white bg. Footer is rgb(8,8,8).
notes.typography: Playfair Display (serif) for H1 at 72px; Inter (sans-serif) for body/paragraphs.
notes.ctas: All CTAs funnel to a single Calendly link: https://calendly.com/get10xai/discovery
notes.socialProof: Stats ticker: 64% booking increase, 3 min claim resolution, 72 hrs to market, $72K dev savings, 47% cost reduction, 3x more leads
notes.caseStudy: Sanitol Lead Generation — 3x qualified leads, 40% more contracts, 10 sec response time
notes.servicesLabels: Eyebrow: 'SERVICES'; case studies eyebrow: 'CASE STUDIES'; process eyebrow: 'OUR PROCESS'; CTA section eyebrow: 'READY TO TRANSFORM?'
